plate.comment:
Returns the byte at item data record offset +0x104 for an item unit.

Source: ..\Source\D2Common\Items.cpp

Algorithm:
1. If pUnit is NULL, return 0
2. If pUnit->dwType != 4 (item), return 0
3. Get item data record via GetItemDataRecord(classId)
4. Return byte value at record+0x104

Parameters:
  pUnit: UnitAny * - item unit pointer (NULL-safe, type-checked)

Returns:
  byte: Item record field at +0x104 (weapon style for equipped items). 0 on failure.

Special Cases:
  - NULL pUnit: returns 0
  - Non-item unit (dwType != 4): returns 0

tags.name: CONF_LIVE
tags.comment: CONF axis (equivalence proof), rung 3/4. Proven bit-exact LIVE via the D2Debugger direct-call oracle on chosen inputs against the running game (GRADUATED_CONFORMANCE_PIPELINE_PLAN.md). Mutually exclusive with CONF_DRAFT/CONF_VECTORS/CONF_BATTLETESTED.
